title: AOKKR Fly Zapper, Electric Insect Killer 1800mAh Rechargeable Bug Zapper Racket 4000V with LED Attractant Light, Handheld & Stand-Up Insect Zapper for Indoor & Outdoor, Camping, XXL Size – 1 Pack
bullet_points: ⚡SUPERIOR TO TRADITIONAL FLY SWATTERS! Press the button, swing the electric mosquito swatter, effortlessly eliminate annoying mosquitoes and fruit flies without leaving a mess on your hands or unsightly marks on your walls and floors.

🪰AUTOMATIC FLY CONTROL. With an integrated fluorescent mosquito lure, activate the fluorescent light, attracting and swiftly eliminating flying insects. This dual-functionality as both a swatter and lamp provides cost-effective value.

⚡4000V POWERFUL VOLTAGE, BIGGER INSECT? JUST FRY! AOKKR electric fly swatter rapidly eradicates mosquitoes, fruit flies, and even larger pests like spiders or wasps. No pest can escape the electric fly swatter.

🦟AVOIDS CHEMICAL INSECTICIDES, SAFE FOR THE FAMILY! Your new helper will quickly and effectively rescue you from unnecessary torment—with just one full swing, you'll send those annoying flies, bugs, and mosquitoes to dust .

🐝SAFETY ASSURANCE. The electric mosquito swatter is equipped with an external protective mesh and a dedicated activation button, ensuring it operates only when intentionally activated. This design provides a high level of safety, making it suitable for everyone.

🦟RECHARGEABLE BATTERY, LONG-LASTING. Built-in 1800mAh rechargeable battery, it offers extended use without frequent replacements, saving both the environment and your budget. Superior craftsmanship ensures durability, providing a hassle-free summer without pesky flying insects.
